sys_script_fix.description:
2.7 STRY0111418 - Integrate with DocInt Standard Form Widget - Fix Script and Documentation story for upgrade
This fix script updates the DocInt configuration to remove hard coded settings in Tasker. - The Tasker Settings fro the 4 GUIDs are no longer needed. - Manually add a new DocInt List view configuration for the Template Task Shared folder (see documentation on fix script in 2.7 release notes) - 5 New Form Configuration entries are created in the DocIntegrator Form Configuration table for each of the forms that were previously mapped using the 4 GUIDs to map the ServicePortal views to DI Views
- NOTE: there is a cross scope priveledge issue for the DocInt Form Config table. - You may need to copy this Fix Script into a background execution window and change the application to DocIntegrator to execute.
sys_script_fix.name: Tasker 2.7_Fix_Update_Document_Views
